description:
**Context:** The Prometheus metrics endpoint (`/api/metrics/prometheus`) declares `agent_cost_usd_total`, `agent_execution_duration_seconds`, and `active_agents_count` counters/histograms/gauges but they are NEVER incremented during agent execution. The Grafana dashboards reference these metrics but will show zeros until they're wired.

Additionally, Langfuse tracks LLM-specific data (tokens, costs, traces) that should be bridged to Prometheus so Grafana becomes a single pane of glass.

**Implementation (push-based approach):**

1. In `AgentService` or the execution completion handler, after a feature execution completes:
   - Increment `agent_cost_usd_total` with labels `{feature_id, model}` using `executionHistory[].costUsd`
   - Record `agent_execution_duration_seconds` histogram with `{feature_id, complexity}` using `executionHistory[].durationMs`
   - Update `active_agents_count` gauge on agent start/stop

2. Add new metrics:
   - `agent_tokens_input_total` — Counter (model) for input tokens consumed
   - `agent_tokens_output_total` — Counter (model) for output tokens consumed
   - `agent_executions_total` — Counter (model, complexity, success) for total executions

3. Wire `features_by_status` gauge to update on feature status changes (currently static)

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/lib/prometheus.ts (add new metric declarations)
- apps/server/src/services/agent-service.ts (increment metrics on start/stop/complete)
- apps/server/src/services/auto-mode-service.ts (update active_agents_count)
- apps/server/src/services/feature-loader.ts (update features_by_status on status change)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] agent_cost_usd_total increments after each agent execution with correct cost
- [ ] agent_execution_duration_seconds records histogram after each execution
- [ ] active_agents_count reflects actual running agent count in real-time
- [ ] agent_tokens_input_total and agent_tokens_output_total track token consumption
- [ ] features_by_status updates dynamically on status changes
- [ ] Grafana Agent Performance dashboard shows real data after agents run
- [ ] npm run build:server succeeds
title: Wire Agent Execution Metrics into Prometheus
